examples: Some hypotheses fail to account for simultaneous extinctions on land and in the seas.
A lack of flow is characterized by, interruptions, simultaneous speech or mutual silences.
With simultaneous interpreting, you start translating almost as soon as the other person starts speaking.
She was given the organ in a simultaneous operation on both women involving two surgeons.
Medicine needed to be disrupted, Kenagy realized, to deliver the simultaneous goals of higher quality and lower price.
